content: Commander Lilith & the Fight for Sanctuary
name: Mouthwash
description: Mouthwash is an Effervescent relic made by the Eridians, introduced with the Fight for Sanctuary DLC for Borderlands 2.
notes: At maximum roll, Mouthwash can boost assault rifle damage by up to 47.5%.

special.description: Passively increases assault rifle damage. While the Toothpick is equipped, it also gains a separate +200% damage bonus. Salvador note: if Mouthwash is equipped and Toothpick is held in the left hand, the +200% bonus applies to the weapon in the right hand. Red text: Gargle and spit.
special.title: Gargle and spit.
